data.title: ETH hits $3,300 on bullish momentum from institutional support, regulatory clarity, and strong tech performance.
data.description: The price of Ethereum has exceeded $3,300, experiencing a significant surge due to increased interest from institutional investors, clear regulatory guidelines, and impressive technical advancements. These factors have combined to drive a strong bullish momentum for ETH.

data.title: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell defends $2.5 billion Fed HQ renovation, ensures no extravagant features or misuse of funds.
data.description: Jerome Powell, the Federal Reserve Chair, defended the central bank's multi-billion-dollar renovation project of its Washington, D.C. headquarters, stating that it is being handled responsibly without any excessive features or misuse of public funds. The renovation of the Marriner S. Eccles Building and the 1951 Constitution Avenue Building was deemed necessary due to their aging infrastructure, both constructed in the 1930s. Powell emphasized that neither building had undergone a comprehensive renovation since their construction, and the current project aims to address significant structural repairs, ensuring the buildings are safe and conducive work environments. Powell's letter to the Office of Management and Budget Director highlighted the essential updates being made to the buildings for improved functionality.

data.title: Indonesia faced trade challenges with China long before Trump, countering influx of inexpensive Chinese products.
data.description: Before imposing tariffs, President Trump targeted Indonesia with trade measures, while the country struggled with an influx of low-cost Chinese products.

data.title: NVIDIA launches CUTLASS 4.0, boosts GPU performance for deep learning and HPC with Python interface. #CUDA #Microkernels #NVIDIA
data.description: NVIDIA has recently launched CUTLASS 4.0, which now includes a Python interface aimed at boosting GPU performance for deep learning and high-performance computing. This latest version incorporates CUDA Tensors and Spatial Microkernels to achieve this goal, making it a significant advancement in utilizing NVIDIA's technology for enhanced computational capabilities.

data.title: SEMIFIVE files pre-IPO review on KRX in South Korea on July 17, 2025. Leading design solution provider initiates IPO application.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, SEMIFIVE, a prominent design solution provider and innovator of platform-based custom silicon solutions based in Seoul, South Korea, revealed the submission of its initial IPO application to the Korea Exchange (KRX). This milestone signifies the formal initiation of its public offering process.

data.title: US House passed crucial crypto bills, including the GENIUS Act. SEC Chair called it a milestone for crypto with praise from industry leaders like Coinbase CEO. Market close to clear regulatory framework.
data.description: The House of Representatives in the U.S. recently passed key pieces of legislation aimed at establishing clear working rules for the cryptocurrency industry. One of the bills that passed is the GENIUS Act, also known as the stablecoin bill, which SEC Chair Paul Atkins called a "historic milestone" for crypto entrepreneurs and market participants. This move was celebrated by the cryptocurrency community and top officials of the Trump administration. Brian Armstrong, CEO of Coinbase Global Inc., described the development as "huge," stating that the industry is close to having a clear regulatory framework. Jeremy Allaire, co-founder and CEO of Circle Internet Financial, also commended Congress for its efforts. The passage of these bills is seen as a significant step towards providing clarity and regulation for the cryptocurrency market in the United States.
